forum.sidebar_placeholder:
Enter sidebar content using Markdown...

## Links
- [Example](https://example.com)

**Bold** and *italic* are supported.

admin.instruction_1: Navigate to any tag page on the forum.
admin.instruction_2: An "Edit Sidebar" button will appear in the sidebar for users with permission.
admin.instruction_3: Click the button to open the editor, write content in Markdown, then save.
admin.instruction_4: Assign the permission below to allow moderators to edit sidebar content.
